name: Black Forest Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract together until thick and fluffy, about 10 minutes.
2. Alternately fold in chocolate and flour into the egg mixture, ending with flour.
3. Pour batter into three greased and floured 8-inch round cake pans.
4. Bake in a preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool cakes in pans for 5 minutes; then turn out onto racks to cool completely.
6. To make syrup: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan and boil for 5 minutes. Let cool, then stir in kirsch.
7. Prick each cake layer and pour the prepared syrup over all three layers.
8. For filling: Beat powdered sugar and butter until well blended. Add egg yolk and beat until light and fluffy, about 3 to 5 minutes. Fold in kirsch.
9. Assemble the cake by placing one layer on a serving plate. Spread with filling. Using 3/4 cup of cherries (patted dry), drop cherries evenly over cream. Place second layer on top. Repeat with remaining layers.
10. Fold 2 tablespoons powdered sugar into whipped cream. Cover sides and top of the cake with whipped cream.
11. Decorate the top of the cake with remaining cherries.
12. To make chocolate curls: Shave the chocolate bar (at room temperature) with a vegetable peeler. Refrigerate curls until ready to use.
13. Press chocolate curls on the sides of the cake and sprinkle a few on top.
14. Chill before serving.
